title: Strait of Hormuz blockade and other major naval sieges in modern times — historical comparison
snippet: Al Jazeera historical analysis comparing the 2026 Hormuz blockade to prior naval sieges. Shipping traffic through Hormuz has dropped by more than 90% since the conflict began. The dual blockade — US blocking Iran, Iran blocking the Gulf — is unprecedented in modern naval warfare.
tag_reason: New analytical/historical comparison piece not previously published
